title: euphrasia officinalis subsp. officinalis
intro: Euphrasia officinalis subsp. officinalis, also known as Eyebright, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and combat bacterial and fungal infections, making it a popular choice for treating eye and ear infections. The health benefits of Eyebright include its potential to alleviate symptoms of conjunctivitis, sinusitis, and other respiratory issues, as well as its ability to soothe dry, irritated eyes. Eyebright is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or eye wash, allowing individuals to harness its medicinal properties and experience its numerous health benefits.
